      <h1>NEWS</h1>

	 <div class="inner1000">
		 <div id="breadcrumb" class="inner"><ul><li><a href="https://takatsu-mfg.jp"><span>ホーム</span></a></li><li><a href="https://takatsu-mfg.jp/category/news/"><span>NEWS</span></a></li><li><span>岡崎信用金庫経済月報に 弊社社長 髙津 のインタビューが掲載されました</span></li></ul></div>	 </div>
	 
	 <section class="news">
		 <div class="inner1000">
			<p class="date">2024.07.09</p>
			 <h2>岡崎信用金庫経済月報に 弊社社長 髙津 のインタビューが掲載されました</h2>
			 <p>2024年5月発刊の岡崎信用金庫経済月報に 弊社社長 髙津 の記事が掲載されました。</p>
<p><a href="https://takatsu-mfg.jp/news/59/attachment/takatsu_web_01_top_202406-2/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" class="alignnone wp-image-78 size-full" src="https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-1-scaled.jpg" alt="" width="677" height="2560" srcset="https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-1-scaled.jpg 677w, https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-1-79x300.jpg 79w, https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-1-271x1024.jpg 271w, https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-1-768x2903.jpg 768w, https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-1-406x1536.jpg 406w" sizes="(max-width: 677px) 100vw, 677px" /></a><br />
<a href="https://takatsu-mfg.jp/news/59/attachment/takatsu_web_01_top_202406-3/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img decoding="async" class="alignnone wp-image-79 size-full" src="https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-2-scaled.jpg" alt="" width="677" height="2560" srcset="https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-2-scaled.jpg 677w, https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-2-79x300.jpg 79w, https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-2-271x1024.jpg 271w, https://takatsu-mfg.jp/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/takatsu-president-article-capture-2-406x1536.jpg 406w" sizes="(max-width: 677px) 100vw, 677px" /></a></p>
